summary: Channel tracking feature fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests pass. All 7 channel types (SMS, WhatsApp, Email, Messenger, Telegram, LinkedIn, Clipboard) are properly stored and returned in events. Lead-sources route ordering fix verified. Frontend Activity tab displays colored channel badges correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Channel tracking implementation is complete and correct across full stack
Backend properly stores and returns 'channel' field in contact_events collection
Frontend Activity tab renders channel badges with correct icons (logo-whatsapp, mail, chatbubble, etc.) and colors
Contact detail expanded events show channel badge when event is expanded
find-or-create-and-log endpoint accepts both 'event_channel' and 'channel' field aliases
seed_data_creation: Created test events with all 7 channel types (whatsapp, sms, email, messenger, telegram, linkedin, clipboard)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Channel tracking feature is fully implemented and working. Test user ID: 69a0b7095fddcede09591667. Test contact ID: 69ab3469288fdc414aa10a6e. Activity feed shows channel badges with colored icons next to event titles.
